-- Data required by [[Module:Text]]. -- Either Lua string patterns (defined by codepoint) or information about quotes
local data = {}
data.PatternCJK = mw.ustring.char( 91, 4352, 45, 4607, 11904, 45, 42191, 43072, 45, 43135, 44032, 45, 55215, 63744, 45, 64255, 65072, 45, 65103, 65381, 45, 65500, 131072, 45, 196607, 93 )

local RangesLatin = { { 7, 687 }, { 7531, 7578 }, { 7680, 7935 }, { 8194, 8250 } } local PatternLatin = "^[" for i = 1, #RangesLatin do local range = RangesLatin[ i ] PatternLatin = PatternLatin .. mw.ustring.char( range[ 1 ], 45, range[ 2 ] ) end PatternLatin = PatternLatin .. "]*$" data.RangesLatin = RangesLatin data.NumLatinRanges = #RangesLatin data.PatternLatin = PatternLatin
data.PatternTerminated = mw.ustring.char( 91, 12290, 65281, 65294, 65311 ) .. "!%.%?вА¶][\"'%]вАєвАЇ¬Ђ¬ївАШвАЩвАЬвАЭ]*$"
